component.name: Owera MindFlow
component.summary: A MindNode-inspired open source mind map app for Linux

description.p: Owera MindFlow is a MindNode-inspired, open source mind mapping application for Linux. Branch ideas freely on an infinite canvas with organic, vertical, horizontal and compact layouts, style nodes with shapes, colors and themes, attach notes, images, tags, stickers and tasks, draw cross-connections between ideas, focus on a single branch, and work in an always-synced outline view.
Import and export OPML, Markdown, FreeMind, CSV, plain text, PNG, SVG and PDF.
First milestone: core mapping, layouts, themes, rich content, cross-connections, outline view and import/export.
